description: Generate vector embeddings using any OpenRouter embedding model. The model is an input, so it can be specified or swapped from outside the flow rather than baked into the node.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: Text, or an array of texts, to convert into embedding vectors

inputs.name: model
inputs.description: OpenRouter embedding model id (e.g. openai/text-embedding-3-small, google/gemini-embedding-001, qwen/qwen3-embedding-8b). Wire this from a flow input to swap models externally.

inputs.name: dimensions
inputs.description: Optional: reduce the output vector size. Only some models support this (e.g. OpenAI text-embedding-3-*, Gemini, Qwen3). Leave null for the model default.

outputs.name: embedding
outputs.description: The embedding vector for the first (or only) input

outputs.name: embeddings
outputs.description: Array of embedding vectors, one per input (in input order)

outputs.name: model
outputs.description: The embedding model that actually produced the vectors

outputs.name: cost_total
outputs.description: Total cost (USD), reported by OpenRouter usage accounting for the chosen model.
